scripts.check:conflicts: if command -v rg >/dev/null 2>&1; then if rg -n "^(<<<<<<<|=======|>>>>>>>)" src; then echo "Merge conflict markers found. Resolve conflicts before build."; exit 1; else rc=$?; if [ "$rc" -eq 1 ]; then echo "No merge conflict markers found."; exit 0; fi; echo "Conflict check failed (rg exit $rc)."; exit "$rc"; fi; else if grep -R -n -E "^(<<<<<<<|=======|>>>>>>>)" src >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "Merge conflict markers found. Resolve conflicts before build."; exit 1; else echo "No merge conflict markers found."; fi; fi
